title: Scheduled refresh + staleness tracking across approved sources
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Approved sources are re-pulled on their recorded cadence with staleness recomputed and gates re-run; stale records are flagged, never silently shown as current.
objective: Build scheduled refresh + staleness tracking that re-pulls each approved source on its cadence, recomputes staleness, re-runs gates, and flags stale records.
acceptanceCriteria: Each approved source re-pulled on its recorded cadence; staleness recomputed; gates re-run.
Stale records flagged (never silently shown as current); >=90% of refreshed records within 90 days.
output: tools/refresh/ scheduled refresh + staleness tracking, committed via PR.
